action.reasoning: Observation: Multi-layer CLIP features achieved 83.88% (up from 80.19%). The frozen backbone approach works well, and complementary features from a second pretrained model should further improve discrimination. Analysis: CLIP and ImageNet-21K ViT learn different representations - CLIP captures semantic visual concepts while ImageNet-21K is optimized for classification. Combining both should provide richer features. Decision: Implement dual-model feature extraction (CLIP + ImageNet-21K ViT) with concatenated 6144-dim features, same MLP+cosine classifier, and TTA.
